hero.title: Tools for every
hero.description: Server jars, start scripts, server status, text formatting — everything in one place. Free, no login required.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: A growing collection of tools built for Minecraft server admins and players.

serverjars.title: Server Jars
serverjars.description: Browse and download Paper and Leaf server builds. Versions sourced directly from official APIs.

bat.title: BAT Generator
bat.description: Generate optimized Windows start scripts for Paper and Leaf servers with Aikar's JVM flags.

mcping.title: Server Status
mcping.description: Ping any Java server without query protocol. Get version, player count, MOTD and latency.

minimessage.title: MiniMessage Editor
minimessage.description: Write and preview MiniMessage formatted text with colors, gradients and formatting tags.

smalltext.title: Small Text
smalltext.description: Convert normal text to small caps unicode characters. Optional capitalize-first mode.

nethercoords.title: Nether Coords
nethercoords.description: Calculate portal coordinates between Overworld and Nether using the 8:1 ratio.

playerprofile.title: Player Profile
playerprofile.description: Look up any Java Edition player — UUID, skin, cape and more.

servericon.title: Server Icon
servericon.description: Convert any image to a 64×64 server-icon.png ready for Minecraft.

givecmd.title: Give Command
givecmd.description: Build a /give command with enchantments for any Minecraft version.

seedmap.title: Seed Map
seedmap.description: Visualize biome distribution for any Minecraft seed. Enter a seed and generate the map.

motd.title: MOTD Generator
motd.description: Create server MOTD with colors and formatting. Live preview included.

footer.tagline: Built for the community, by the community.

settings.title: Settings
settings.quickAccessDesc: Open tools in modal instead of navigating to page
settings.multiToolDesc: Open multiple tools in separate windows (requires Quick Access)

bat.title: Start Script Generator
bat.description: Generate an optimized Windows start script for your Minecraft server.

serverjars.title: Download Server Jars
serverjars.description: Browse and download Paper and Leaf server builds.
serverjars.noBuilds: Select a version to see builds.
serverjars.errorVersions: Failed to load versions. Make sure the backend is running.
serverjars.errorBuilds: No builds found for this version.

mcping.title: MC Server Ping
mcping.description: Check any Java server — no query protocol needed.
mcping.errorBackend: Failed to reach the backend. Make sure it's running.
mcping.widgetDesc: Embed this widget on your website to display live server status.

minimessage.title: MiniMessage Editor
minimessage.description: Select text in the editor, then click a tool to apply formatting.
minimessage.selectFirst: Select some text first to apply formatting

smalltext.title: Small Text Converter
smalltext.description: Convert normal text to small caps unicode characters.
smalltext.toggleDesc: Each word starts with a normal uppercase letter

about.title: Built for the Minecraft community
about.description: Spoak is a free, open-source collection of utility tools for Minecraft server administrators and players. No ads, no login, no nonsense.
about.openSourceDesc: Spoak is fully open source. The code is on GitHub — contributions, bug reports and feature requests are always welcome.
about.heranwDesc: Spoak is developed for the HeraNW community. HeraNW is a premier 1.21.4 Towny Minecraft server.
about.communityDesc: Every tool on Spoak was built from real needs in the Minecraft community. Have an idea? Open an issue.
about.taglineSuffix: supported by the community, free forever.

nethercoords.title: Nether Portal Calculator
nethercoords.description: Enter coordinates in either dimension — the other is calculated instantly.
nethercoords.howDesc: The Nether is 8× smaller — 1 block in the Nether equals 8 blocks in the Overworld.
nethercoords.yNote: Y coordinate does not scale between dimensions.

playerprofile.title: Player Lookup
playerprofile.description: Look up any Java Edition player — UUID, skin, cape and more.

servericon.title: Server Icon Generator
servericon.description: Convert any image to a 64×64 server-icon.png ready for Minecraft.
servericon.footerNote: Minecraft requires server-icon.png to be exactly 64×64 pixels in PNG format.
servericon.errorType: Unsupported file type. Use PNG, JPG, SVG or ICO.

givecmd.title: Give Command Generator
givecmd.description: Build a /give command with enchantments for any Minecraft version.
givecmd.noEnchantments: No enchantments available for this item type.

sponsors.title: Support Spoak
sponsors.description: Spoak is free and open source. If you find it useful, consider sponsoring to help keep it running and growing.
sponsors.whyDesc: Your support helps cover server costs and development time, and keeps Spoak ad-free for everyone.
perks: Get your name listed as a sponsor
sponsors.cryptoDesc: You can also support via cryptocurrency. Click the button to copy the address.
sponsors.qrHint: Scan QR with your mobile wallet or click Open Wallet on desktop
sponsors.connectToSend: Connect your wallet to send ETH directly
sponsors.thanks: Thank you to everyone who supports this project ♥

seedmap.title: Seed Map Viewer
seedmap.description: Visualize biome distribution for any Minecraft seed. Enter a seed and generate the map.
seedmap.betaWarning: This tool is currently in beta and may experience performance issues. We're actively working on optimizations to improve speed and stability.
seedmap.placeholder: Enter a seed and click Generate
seedmap.orbitHint: Drag to pan · Scroll to zoom
seedmap.error: Failed to generate map. Make sure the backend is running.

motd.title: Server MOTD Generator
motd.description: Create a custom Message of the Day for your Minecraft server with colors and formatting.
motd.previewDesc: How it looks in the server list
motd.vanillaDesc: Copy this line to your server.properties file
motd.minimotdDesc: Copy this to your MiniMOTD main.conf file
motd.selectFirst: Select some text first to apply formatting

marketplace.title: Plugin Marketplace
marketplace.description: Browse Minecraft plugins from Modrinth. Click any plugin to view it on Modrinth.

cli.title: Spoak
cli.description: All Spoak tools in your terminal. Single binary, no runtime required. Auto-downloads and updates the backend on first run.
cli.statsDescription: Use Spoak tools in your terminal

runtime.title: Zero runtime
runtime.desc: Single binary — no Node, no Python, no dependencies.

updates.title: Auto-updates
updates.desc: Checks GitHub Releases on every run and updates silently.

cli.pingDesc: Ping any Java server — version, MOTD with full color support, player count and latency.
cli.playerDesc: UUID, skin model, skin & cape URLs.
cli.jarsDesc: All Minecraft versions, color-coded by major release.
cli.helpDesc: Type {cmd} in interactive mode to see all commands.

status.title: API Status
status.description: Live status of all Spoak backend services.

errors.notFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
errors.serverErrorDesc: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again or go back to the home page.
errors.criticalErrorDesc: The application encountered an unexpected error.

docs.title: Backend API Docs
docs.description: Complete reference for the Spoak backend REST API. Base URL: http://localhost:4000/api
docs.techDesc: The backend is built with Rust using Axum, Tokio and Reqwest. It proxies requests to Mojang, PaperMC and Leaf APIs.

versions.detail: Returns a list of stable Minecraft Java Edition release versions sourced from the Mojang version manifest. Sorted newest first.

paperBuilds.summary: Get Paper builds for a version
paperBuilds.detail: Returns all available Paper server builds for the given Minecraft version. Sorted newest first.

paperLatest.detail: Returns the latest stable Paper build for the given version.

leafBuilds.summary: Get Leaf builds for a version
leafBuilds.detail: Returns all available Leaf server builds for the given Minecraft version, sourced from the Leaf API.

mcping.detail: Pings a Java Edition server using the Server List Ping protocol. Works without query protocol enabled. Returns version, player count, MOTD, favicon and latency.

player.detail: Fetches a player's UUID, username, skin URL, cape URL and skin model from the Mojang API.

seedmapVersions.detail: Returns the list of Minecraft versions supported by the biome generator.

seedmapTile.detail: Returns raw biome data as a binary octet-stream. Each biome ID is encoded as a signed 16-bit little-endian integer. Tile is size×size biome IDs sampled at scale 4 (1 sample per 4 blocks).

seedmapStructures.detail: Returns a list of structure markers (village, monument, mansion, etc.) within the given radius around the specified coordinates.

docs.paramSize: Tile size in biome samples (32–256, default: 128)
